Name: Jixie.A-Brawl
Description:
Replaces the A-Wall with a personal dome shield that protects the front half
of the player from damage and amps all bullets that pass through the back.

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_health
ConVars.Description: HP of the held shield before it breaks. 0 = use default.

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_forward_offset
ConVars.Description: Distance in front of the player the sphere sits.

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_dome_scale
ConVars.Description: Scale of shield model (1 = regular dome shield size).
